MED.name: Medical & Clinical
MED.description: Clinical medicine, diseases, treatments, diagnostics, and patient care

PHA.name: Pharmaceuticals & Biotech
PHA.description: Drug development, clinical trials, pharmaceutical regulations, and biotechnology

PUB.name: Public Health & Epidemiology
PUB.description: Population health, disease prevention, epidemiology, and health policy

INS.name: Health Insurance & Economics
INS.description: Health insurance systems, healthcare economics, and payment models

WEL.name: Wellness & Preventive Care
WEL.description: Preventive medicine, nutrition, fitness, and lifestyle health

rules.name: Require Source URL
rules.description: Every fragment must have a source_url from a credible medical source

rules.name: Require Year
rules.description: Every fragment must have a year indicating when the information was verified

rules.name: No Stale Medical Information
rules.description: Fragments older than 3 years cannot exceed credibility score of 50

rules.name: Require Uncertainty for Treatment Claims
rules.description: Any fragment making treatment efficacy claims must include uncertainty note or confidence interval

rules.name: Minimum Credibility Class
rules.description: Fragments must have recognized medical credibility class

rules.name: No Anecdotal Evidence
rules.description: Fragments cannot be based on anecdotal evidence or single case reports without broader context
